title: Simulator: GNSS-PPS CCP schedule model
description: Model CCP v1 GPS-time ASN, hardware-PPS capture error, drift/holdover, root-signed paged schedules, leased cells, setup/occupied/guard windows, shared-cell join, distinct-channel concurrency, GNSS loss/spoof discontinuities, atomic generation replacement, CH0 fallback, and mixed legacy traffic. Use canonical scenarios and seeds 0..99 from CCP-16 and emit machine-readable paired results.
design: Implement the GNSS-PPS slot clock, schedule generations/pages, leased cells, clock error/holdover, setup/occupied/guard windows, join/control contention, and distinct-channel concurrency from spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. Share canonical CCP scenario JSON and paired seed traces with project-LICHEN-da2q.3.
acceptance_criteria: All CCP-16 timing, atomic update, topology, mixed compatibility, security, and dense-star gates pass for seeds 0..99 with machine-readable evidence. Scheduled mode reduces median collision-attributed loss by >=50%, at least 90 seeds show no increase, median PDR does not decrease, and mixed-deployment 95th-percentile regressions remain <=5%.
